next_steps: Bartonella henselae serology (IgG and IgM) and PCR
Bone biopsy of the humeral or sternal lesion
Liver or splenic biopsy if imaging findings persist
Ophthalmologic examination to rule out neuroretinitis
Comprehensive laboratory workup including ESR, CRP, CBC with differential, and LDH
QuantiFERON-TB Gold or TST to rule out tuberculosis
Chest CT to evaluate for subtle lymphadenopathy or pulmonary involvement

differential_diagnoses: Chronic Granulomatous Disease (CGD) with disseminated granulomatous infection
next_steps: Dihydrorhodamine (DHR) flow cytometry to evaluate for Chronic Granulomatous Disease
Bartonella henselae serology (IgG/IgM) and Bartonella species PCR
Biopsy of a bone lesion for histopathology and microbial culture (bacterial, fungal, and mycobacterial)
Comprehensive laboratory workup including ESR, CRP, CBC with differential, and immunoglobulin levels
Ophthalmologic evaluation to screen for subclinical neuroretinitis
Contrast-enhanced chest CT to evaluate for mediastinal or hilar lymphadenopathy
